title: NovaTech- Reactor Core
description: Please refer to the changelog for detailed version information.
body:
1.20.1硬核机械科技整合包，以机械动力为核心，融合沉浸工程、应用能源2与黄铜协奏曲，打造从基础工业到核动力驱动的全维度科技体系！解锁精密机械流水线、跨模组能源互通、自动化资源加工，在齿轮与蒸汽的轰鸣中，构筑属于你的工业帝国，开启核动力机械的全新纪元！


A hardcore tech modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1, centered on Create, integrated with Immersive Engineering, Applied Energistics 2 and Brass Concerto. Build a full-dimensional tech system from basic industry to nuclear power drive! Unlock precise mechanical assembly lines, cross-mod energy interconnection and automated resource processing. Forge your industrial empire in the roar of gears and steam, and start a brand-new era of nuclear-powered machinery!
